Bash(python3 - << 'EOF'
import math

# WCAG contrast ratio calculator
def relative_luminance\(hex_color\):
    hex_color = hex_color.lstrip\('#'\)
    r, g, b = [int\(hex_color[i:i+2], 16\) / 255 for i in \(0, 2, 4\)]
    def linearize\(c\):
        return c / 12.92 if c <= 0.04045 else \(\(c + 0.055\) / 1.055\) ** 2.4
    return 0.2126 * linearize\(r\) + 0.7152 * linearize\(g\) + 0.0722 * linearize\(b\)

def contrast_ratio\(fg, bg\):
    l1 = relative_luminance\(fg\)
    l2 = relative_luminance\(bg\)
    lighter = max\(l1, l2\)
    darker = min\(l1, l2\)
    return \(lighter + 0.05\) / \(darker + 0.05\)

# Key text-on-background combinations found in the CSS
pairs = [
    # \(label, text_color, bg_color\)
    \("body text \(#e8e8f0\) on body bg \(#0f0f13\)",          "#e8e8f0", "#0f0f13"\),
    \("nav-item muted \(#6b6b8a\) on sidebar \(#0d0d11\)",     "#6b6b8a", "#0d0d11"\),
    \("nav-item hover \(#c0c0d8\) on hover bg \(#1a1a24\)",    "#c0c0d8", "#1a1a24"\),
    \("nav-item active \(#a09af5\) on active bg \(#1e1a3a\)",  "#a09af5", "#1e1a3a"\),
    \("logo-text \(#e8e8f0\) on sidebar \(#0d0d11\)",          "#e8e8f0", "#0d0d11"\),
    \("dash-tab-title \(#c8c8e0\) on transparent/body",      "#c8c8e0", "#0f0f13"\),
    \("dash-tab-url \(#4a4a6a\) on body bg \(#0f0f13\)",       "#4a4a6a", "#0f0f13"\),
    \("dash-tab-last-used \(#5a5a7a\) on body bg \(#0f0f13\)", "#5a5a7a", "#0f0f13"\),
    \("window-header \(#4a4a6a\) on body bg \(#0f0f13\)",      "#4a4a6a", "#0f0f13"\),
    \("dash-empty/loading \(#4a4a6a\) on body bg \(#0f0f13\)", "#4a4a6a", "#0f0f13"\),
    \("status success \(#80c0a0\) on \(#101e14\)",              "#80c0a0", "#101e14"\),
    \("status error \(#f08080\) on \(#1e1010\)",                "#f08080", "#1e1010"\),
    \("group-card-name \(#e8e8f0\) on card \(#1a1a24\)",       "#e8e8f0", "#1a1a24"\),
    \("group-card-tab-title \(#c8c8e0\) on card \(#1a1a24\)",  "#c8c8e0", "#1a1a24"\),
    \("group-card-count \(#6b6b8a\) on \(#0f0f13\)",           "#6b6b8a", "#0f0f13"\),
    \("analytics-card-title \(#6b6b8a\) on card \(#1a1a24\)",  "#6b6b8a", "#1a1a24"\),
    \("analytics-stat \(#a09af5\) on card \(#1a1a24\)",        "#a09af5", "#1a1a24"\),
    \("analytics-stat-label \(#4a4a6a\) on card \(#1a1a24\)",  "#4a4a6a", "#1a1a24"\),
    \("domain-name \(#c8c8e0\) on body bg \(#0f0f13\)",        "#c8c8e0", "#0f0f13"\),
    \("domain-count \(#6b6b8a\) on body bg \(#0f0f13\)",       "#6b6b8a", "#0f0f13"\),
    \("recent-title \(#c8c8e0\) on item \(#1a1a24\)",          "#c8c8e0", "#1a1a24"\),
    \("recent-url \(#4a4a6a\) on item \(#1a1a24\)",            "#4a4a6a", "#1a1a24"\),
    \("restore-btn \(#a09af5\) on \(#0f0f13\)",                "#a09af5", "#0f0f13"\),
    \("sidebar-action-btn \(#c0c0d8\) on \(#1a1a24\)",         "#c0c0d8", "#1a1a24"\),
    \("placeholder \(#4a4a6a\) on input \(#1a1a24\)",          "#4a4a6a", "#1a1a24"\),
    \("dash-btn default \(#c0c0d8\) on \(#1a1a24\)",           "#c0c0d8", "#1a1a24"\),
    \("dash-btn primary \(#fff\) on gradient ~\(#6a5cf0\)",    "#ffffff",  "#6a5cf0"\),
]

WCAG_AA_SMALL = 4.5
WCAG_AA_LARGE = 3.0   # large text \(18pt+ or 14pt bold\)

print\(f"{'Label':<55} {'Ratio':>6}  {'AA \(4.5:1\)':>10}  {'Note'}"\)
print\("-" * 100\)
failures = []
for label, fg, bg in pairs:
    r = contrast_ratio\(fg, bg\)
    aa = "PASS" if r >= WCAG_AA_SMALL else "FAIL"
    # large text / decorative items noted
    note = ""
    if "muted" in label or "url" in label or "last-used" in label or "window-header" in label or "placeholder" in label or "empty" in label or "count" in label or "stat-label" in label or "domain-count" in label:
        note = "small/muted UI text"
    print\(f"{label:<55} {r:>6.2f}  {aa:>10}  {note}"\)
    if r < WCAG_AA_SMALL:
        failures.append\(\(label, r\)\)

print\(\)
print\(f"Failures below 4.5:1: {len\(failures\)}"\)
for f in failures:
    print\(f"  {f[0]} — ratio {f[1]:.2f}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 - << 'EOF'
import re

css = open\("/home/pandabars/projects/tab-manager-extension/dashboard.css"\).read\(\)

required = [
    "#dashboard",
    ".sidebar", ".sidebar-logo", ".logo-icon", ".logo-text",
    ".sidebar-nav", ".nav-item", ".nav-item:hover", ".nav-item.active", ".nav-icon",
    ".sidebar-footer", ".sidebar-action-btn", ".sidebar-action-btn:hover",
    ".main-content", ".main-header",
    ".main-header input", ".main-header input:focus", ".main-header input::placeholder",
    ".dash-btn", ".dash-btn.primary", ".dash-btn.primary:hover", ".dash-btn:disabled",
    ".section", ".section.hidden",
    ".dash-status", ".dash-status.show", ".dash-status.success", ".dash-status.error",
    ".dash-empty", ".dash-loading",
    ".window-group", ".window-header",
    ".dash-tab-item", ".dash-tab-item:hover", ".dash-tab-item.active-tab",
    ".dash-tab-favicon", ".dash-tab-favicon.no-icon", ".dash-tab-info", ".dash-tab-title",
    ".dash-tab-url-row", ".dash-tab-url", ".dash-tab-last-used",
    ".group-cards", ".group-card", ".group-card-header", ".group-card-dot",
    ".group-card-name", ".group-card-name:hover", ".group-card-name-input", ".group-card-count",
    ".group-card-tabs", ".group-card-tab", ".group-card-tab:hover", ".group-card-tab-title",
    ".recent-list", ".recent-item", ".recent-info", ".recent-title", ".recent-url",
    ".restore-btn", ".restore-btn:hover",
    ".analytics-grid", ".analytics-card", ".analytics-card-title",
    ".analytics-stat", ".analytics-stat-label",
    ".domain-section-title", ".domain-list", ".domain-item", ".domain-name",
    ".domain-bar-wrap", ".domain-bar", ".domain-count",
    ".sr-only",
]

missing = []
found = []
for sel in required:
    # Normalize: escape dots for regex, allow surrounding whitespace/comma/brace
    pattern = re.escape\(sel\)
    if re.search\(r'\(?:^|[\\s,{]\)' + pattern + r'\(?:[\\s,{:.]\)', css, re.MULTILINE\):
        found.append\(sel\)
    else:
        missing.append\(sel\)

print\(f"Total required: {len\(required\)}"\)
print\(f"Found: {len\(found\)}"\)
print\(f"Missing: {len\(missing\)}"\)
if missing:
    print\("\\nMISSING SELECTORS:"\)
    for m in missing:
        print\(f"  {m}"\)
else:
    print\("\\nAll selectors present."\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 - << 'EOF'
import re

css = open\("/home/pandabars/projects/tab-manager-extension/dashboard.css"\).read\(\)

# 1. Check design tokens presence
tokens = {
    "body bg #0f0f13":   "#0f0f13",
    "sidebar bg #0d0d11": "#0d0d11",
    "card bg #1a1a24":   "#1a1a24",
    "accent #7c6af7":    "#7c6af7",
    "primary text #e8e8f0": "#e8e8f0",
    "secondary text #c8c8e0": "#c8c8e0",
    "muted text #6b6b8a": "#6b6b8a",
}
print\("=== Design Token Presence ==="\)
for name, token in tokens.items\(\):
    count = css.lower\(\).count\(token.lower\(\)\)
    status = "PRESENT" if count > 0 else "MISSING"
    print\(f"  {status}  {name} \({token}\) — {count} occurrences"\)

# 2. Hunt for missing units \(bare numbers in property values that need px/em/%\)
# Only flag suspicious patterns: property: <number> ; where number > 0
print\("\\n=== Potential Missing Units ==="\)
# Look for patterns like: property: 0.4 ; or property: 36 ; \(not inside color/z-index etc\)
unit_issue = re.findall\(
    r'\([\\w-]+\)\\s*:\\s*\([0-9]+\(?:\\.[0-9]+\)?\)\\s*;',
    css
\)
exempt_props = {'opacity', 'z-index', 'flex', 'flex-shrink', 'flex-grow', 'font-weight',
                'line-height', 'columns', 'order', 'counter-reset', 'counter-increment'}
for prop, val in unit_issue:
    if prop in exempt_props:
        continue
    if val == '0':
        continue  # 0 never needs units
    print\(f"  Possible missing unit: {prop}: {val};"\)

# 3. Check for broken/duplicate selectors \(simple: look for empty rule blocks\)
print\("\\n=== Empty Rule Blocks ==="\)
empties = re.findall\(r'\([^{}]+\)\\{\\s*\\}', css\)
if empties:
    for e in empties:
        print\(f"  Empty block: {e.strip\(\)}"\)
else:
    print\("  None found."\)

# 4. Check .dash-status uses display:none default \(required for show/hide pattern\)
print\("\\n=== .dash-status display pattern ==="\)
status_block = re.search\(r'\\.dash-status\\s*\\{\([^}]+\)\\}', css\)
if status_block:
    block = status_block.group\(1\)
    if 'display: none' in block or 'display:none' in block:
        print\("  CORRECT: .dash-status defaults to display:none"\)
    else:
        print\("  WARNING: .dash-status does not set display:none — show/hide toggle may be broken"\)

# 5. Check .section.hidden uses display:none
print\("\\n=== .section.hidden display pattern ==="\)
hidden_block = re.search\(r'\\.section\\.hidden\\s*\\{\([^}]+\)\\}', css\)
if hidden_block:
    block = hidden_block.group\(1\)
    if 'display: none' in block or 'display:none' in block:
        print\("  CORRECT: .section.hidden uses display:none"\)
    else:
        print\("  WARNING: .section.hidden does not use display:none"\)

# 6. Check .dash-status.show overrides to a visible display value
print\("\\n=== .dash-status.show display override ==="\)
show_block = re.search\(r'\\.dash-status\\.show\\s*\\{\([^}]+\)\\}', css\)
if show_block:
    block = show_block.group\(1\)
    if 'display:' in block or 'display :' in block:
        print\(f"  Override: {block.strip\(\)}"\)
    else:
        print\("  WARNING: .dash-status.show has no display override"\)

EOF)
